title: Vantage AI Walk-Through — How It Works in 90 Seconds

scenes.narration: Vantage. The AI job preparation tool. Walk-through, 2026 edition.
Vantage takes one job posting URL and one CV. In about 90 seconds, it returns a complete prep pack. Here is what is inside.

First. Company intelligence. Vantage scrapes the job posting and the company website to give you the industry context, the recent highlights, and the culture signals you need to reference in your interview.

visual.heading: 1. Company Intelligence
bullets: Industry + size + founding context
Recent product or funding news
Culture signals from the job page
What they actually care about right now

scenes.narration: Second. A tailored cover letter. Four selectable tones — Professional, Warm, Direct, Creative. Pick the one that matches the company. Switch between them with one click.

visual.heading: 2. Cover Letter — 4 Tones
bullets: Professional · safest for finance, legal, traditional industries
Warm · fits people-first roles and mission-driven companies
Direct · best for senior IC roles and infrastructure teams
Creative · matches startups and brand-led companies

scenes.narration: Third. Likely interview questions. Twelve questions generated from the actual job description, plus an AI-graded mock interview where you practice your answers and get real feedback.

visual.heading: 3. Mock Interview
bullets: 12 questions generated from the actual JD
AI-graded practice with structure feedback
Live speech-to-text — practice out loud
Behavioural and technical mix

scenes.narration: Fourth. The CV fit score. Not an invented number — a calibrated breakdown of where your CV matches the role and where it does not. With explicit gap-closing actions you can take before the interview.

visual.heading: 4. CV Fit Score
bullets: Calibrated score, not an invented metric
Match points · explicit list of strengths
Gap analysis · what is missing for this role
Closing moves · concrete actions before applying

scenes.narration: Fifth. A five-minute interview pitch. Structured as a real spoken pitch — origin, expertise, why now, why them, ask. Compressed, memorable, and ready for the moment they say tell me about yourself.

visual.heading: 5. 5-Minute Pitch
bullets: Origin · the one-line career summary
Expertise · two specific evidence points
Why now · why this role at this moment
Why them · what you noticed about the company

scenes.narration: Pricing. Three free analyses on signup, no credit card required. Five pounds for twenty tokens, never expire — that is six full applications. Twelve pounds a month for sixty tokens. Twenty pounds a month for the Premium tier including the fit score and presentation deck.

visual.heading: Pricing
bullets: Free · 3 analyses on signup, no card
Starter · £5 once, 20 tokens, never expire
Pro · £12/mo, 60 tokens, monthly renewal
Premium · £20/mo, 120 tokens + fit score + deck

scenes.narration: Three sample analyses are public. Anthropic Senior PM. Stripe Staff PM. OpenAI ML Engineer. Real job postings, full output, no signup required to view. See what the AI actually produces before you spend anything.

visual.heading: See Real Output First
bullets: aimvantage.uk/sample/anthropic-senior-pm
aimvantage.uk/sample/stripe-staff-pm
aimvantage.uk/sample/openai-ml-eng
Full output · no signup · no gating

scenes.narration: Vantage. Built solo, in public, in six weeks. Real signup numbers visible on the homepage. Open-source ATS scanner companion at github. Try Vantage free at aimvantage.uk.

visual.subtitle: Try free · 3 analyses · no card required
